workloads.name: Browser ORT WebGPU compare sentiment
workloads.description: Repo-only same-stack Chromium Playwright ORT WebGPU compare for the vendored DistilBERT sentiment workload.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict same-stack browser ORT compare. Both sides run the same vendored Chromium task, same ONNX model, same browser build family, and same host. The intended difference is Doe versus Dawn WebGPU runtime selection.

workloads.name: Browser ORT WebGPU compare sentiment medium
workloads.description: Repo-only same-stack Chromium Playwright ORT WebGPU compare for a medium-length DistilBERT sentiment shape between the short and longform variants.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict same-stack browser ORT compare. Both sides run the same vendored Chromium task, same ONNX model, same browser build family, and same host. The intended difference is Doe versus Dawn WebGPU runtime selection.

workloads.name: Browser ORT WebGPU compare sentiment longform
workloads.description: Repo-only same-stack Chromium Playwright ORT WebGPU compare for the longer-form vendored DistilBERT sentiment workload.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict same-stack browser ORT compare. Both sides run the same vendored Chromium task, same ONNX model, same browser build family, and same host. The intended difference is Doe versus Dawn WebGPU runtime selection.
